hero.desc_p1: Professional pest control service in Barcelona. Fast, safe intervention with a guarantee.

problem.title: Seeing cockroaches at home or in your business is not just uncomfortable…
problem.subtitle: it's a feeling of loss of control.
problem.desc: It generates stress, insecurity, and health concerns.
problem.hook: And what you really want is not just to eliminate them… it's to feel peaceful in your space again.

species.desc_part1: Correctly identifying the species is the first step towards definitive eradication. At
species.desc_part2: we combine science with local expertise.

germanica.title: German Cockroach
germanica.shortDesc: The most common pest in kitchens and catering. Small, fast, and highly prolific.
germanica.fullDesc: The German cockroach is the main concern in Barcelona. At CECSA we use gel-bait technology to eradicate the entire nest without evacuation.
germanica.habitat: Indoors, areas of constant heat and humidity.
germanica.impact: Food contamination and reputation crises in businesses.

americana.title: American Cockroach
americana.shortDesc: The largest species. Reddish-colored, flies and mainly inhabits sewers.
americana.fullDesc: Known as the "super cockroach", up to 5 cm long. They access through pipes or flying. We apply long-lasting barriers.
americana.habitat: Sewers, air chambers, and false ceilings.
americana.impact: Transmission of bacterial pathogens and strong visual impact.

oriental.title: Oriental Cockroach
oriental.shortDesc: Deep black in color, prefers cool and humid environments.
oriental.fullDesc: Associated with culverts and dirt areas. Our approach combines technical disinsectization with physical exclusion.
oriental.habitat: Basements, street-level manholes, and garbage areas.
oriental.impact: High allergen load and contamination on surfaces.

about.desc: At CECSA, we act quickly and precisely to completely eliminate the pest through advanced intervention protocols.

steps: Safe products for people and pets
about.hook: We ensure the problem truly disappears.
about.excelence_desc: We know where to act and how to do it for final results.
about.ethics_desc: Safe and professional treatments for your environment.

steps.title: Inspection

origen.title: Comprehensive Recovery of Squatted Homes
origen.slogan: We transform deteriorated spaces into dignified, safe homes ready for life again.
origen.desc: We offer a comprehensive recovery service for squatted or abandoned homes, designed to relieve the burden on owners and revaluate the property.
origen.process_title: We take care of the entire process:
origen.guarantee: With the experience and guarantee of CECSA Desinfeccions, we ensure an impeccable final result.
origen.goal: Turning a problem into an opportunity, recovering the value of your property with a high-quality service.
